summary: P0 Bug Fix Verified: Async AI job system now uses MongoDB instead of in-memory dict. Backend APIs working correctly - all 4 key endpoints tested and passing. Frontend loads but browser automation login has session issues (works via curl).

integration_issues.issue: Session not persisting after login click - stays on /auth page. Works via curl with cookies.
integration_issues.priority: LOW - not a bug in app, likely browser automation cookie issue

critical_code_review_comments: ai.py lines 138-173: POST /api/ai/generate-async correctly creates job in MongoDB 'generation_jobs' collection, returns job_id immediately
ai.py lines 176-204: GET /api/ai/generate-async/{job_id} correctly reads from MongoDB, handles processing/completed/failed states, cleans up job after retrieval
ai.py lines 25-135: _run_generation_task background task stores result in MongoDB when complete, enabling multi-worker access
AIAssistant.js lines 211-263: Frontend polls with retry logic, treats 404 as transient (correct per fix)
LessonPlanner.js lines 712-748: Same async generation with retry pattern

success_rate.backend: 100% - All 4 async AI endpoints verified via curl
success_rate.frontend: N/A - Login automation issue prevented full UI testing

context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 bug fix verified via backend API tests. MongoDB job storage working correctly - jobs created in one request are accessible from subsequent poll requests. Frontend pages AIAssistant.js and LessonPlanner.js exist with correct async poll logic. For UI testing, use curl-based login to get session cookie or test via the actual browser.

POST /api/ai/generate-async.details: Returns job_id with status 'processing'. Job stored in MongoDB 'generation_jobs' collection. Example: job_f84307abdcbb

GET /api/ai/generate-async/{job_id} - pr.details: Returns {status: 'processing'} while AI generation is running

GET /api/ai/generate-async/{job_id} - co.details: Returns {status: 'completed', generation_id, content, metadata, created_at}. Content is AI-generated lesson plan/summary. Job cleaned up after retrieval.

GET /api/ai/generate-async/{job_id} - 40.details: Non-existent job_id returns 404 with {detail: 'Job not found'}

Full async generation flow.details: Created job 'job_f84307abdcbb', polled once, received completed status with full AI-generated content (1959 chars) in ~3 seconds

Frontend AIAssistant page.details: Page loads at /ai-assistant. Browser automation login session not persisting, but page structure correct with data-testid attributes

Frontend LessonPlanner page.details: Same login session issue as AIAssistant

bug_rca.root_cause: Backend runs with --workers 4 uvicorn workers. Jobs were stored in _generation_jobs Python dict (in-memory). Job created in Worker 1's memory was invisible to Worker 2/3/4 when polled, causing 'Job Not Found' 404 errors.
fix_applied: 2. Added MongoDB collection 'generation_jobs' for job storage (ai.py line 148)
3. generate_content_async() now inserts job to MongoDB before spawning background task (lines 147-154)
5. Jobs cleaned up after successful retrieval (lines 186, 190)
6. Frontend treats 404 as transient during polling (AIAssistant.js line 256, LessonPlanner.js line 745)
bug_rca.verification: Tested complete flow: job_f84307abdcbb created -> polled -> completed in ~3 seconds with full AI content returned. No 'Job Not Found' error.
